title: Lock v0.4.0 post-release state
reason: Lock the v0.4.0 post-release state after release asset verification, curl installer verification, and install docs sync, while preserving Planned Homebrew status, model workspace packs as UX, and the pre-runtime ni-kernel boundary.
proposed_changes: Add CAP-020 for the verified v0.4.0 post-release distribution state.

Record v0.4.0 release binary and curl installer availability after verification, install docs current-release sync, Planned / deferred Homebrew status, and model workspace packs as UX rather than CLI authority.
Add REQ-020, EVAL-024, RISK-017, DEC-016, NG-012, and post-release artifacts while preserving prompt-only ni run behavior and the pre-runtime ni-kernel boundary.
risk_impact: Adds a high-severity post-release overclaim risk so verified release/curl availability cannot drift into Homebrew availability, package-manager claims, runtime execution, codex exec, tag publishing, or model-pack authority claims.
readiness_impact: Expected to become READY after docs explain the accepted cli delivery surface and CAP-020 is accepted with a linked requirement, evaluation, mitigated high-severity risk, artifacts, non-goal, and no blocker questions.
